name: Sysctl redirect parameters
description: Disable IP redirect acceptance in system sysctl configs.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper sysctl redirect parameters settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Sysctl redirect parameters. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `net.ipv4.conf.all.accept_redirects=0` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "net.ipv4.conf.all.accept_redirects=0", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-KOH-02", "cost": "LOW", "estimated_time_hours": 4}
